{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = the Sword
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The weapons officer is called [[the Sword]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16">''The Captain'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“Horizon, you said the weapons officer was called the Sword, didn’t you?”<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
